root_causes: Fifteen accepted Oh-My-Pi lane definitions consumed an ignored campaign-workspace freeze-provenance path, so a clean checkout could not resolve the declared input.

lane_acceptance_artifacts.build_lane wrote fresh claims, manifests, freeze rows, and governed evidence beneath output_root, then validated the canonical pre-capture claim and manifest under ROOT; fresh capture therefore PIN_STALEd before promotion.

symptoms: candidate validation returned PIN_STALE because canonical paths were supplied
declared freeze input was docs_tmp/phase_15/source_freezes/oh_my_pi_main_5356713e_freeze_provenance.json rather than a tracked checkout file

after_at_head.north_star_capture: exit 0; breadboard_self_runtime_records_v1, claude_code_north_star_capture_v1, and opencode_north_star_capture_v1 all executed_pass

commands: base detached scratch: BB_WORKSPACE_ROOT=/Users/kylemccleary/projects/breadboard PYTHONPATH=<base-wt> <venv-python> -m pytest -q tests/e4_parity/test_lane_acceptance_candidate_validation.py (exit 1, 2 failed)
findings: Candidate validation now uses candidate-materialized claim, manifest, freeze, and governed output bytes and copies immutable checkout inputs into the isolated validation root; run_lane remains capture owner.
Canonical promotion/rebinding ownership remains with run_lane/regenerate_evidence plus build_artifact_catalog and generate_support_claims.
breadboard_self_runtime_records_v1 was not rebound to the P6.6 tracked atomic-feature-ledger sidecar.

The historical 22-failure count is grounded in M1/spine_reds_taxonomy.json; the new focused clean-checkout test collapses those repeated failures into one tracked-input invariant over all 15 declaring lanes.
